articles.title: Woodlands flats, Prime projects in Bishan and Berlayar draw first-timer interest in June BTO launch
articles.summary:
📰 주택, 정치, 기술 관련 뉴스
📢 Woodlands flats, Prime projects in Bishan and Berlayar draw first-timer interest...
articles.content: The flats here have a wait of 3½ years. Applications close at 11.59pm on June 24 on the HDB Flat Portal. Standard flats do not incur subsidy recovery when they are sold and come with a five-year minimum occupation period (MOP)
